✎ *𝘉𝘳𝘰, 𝘪𝘷𝘦 𝘣𝘦𝘦𝘯 𝘵𝘳𝘺𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘵𝘰 𝘧𝘪𝘯𝘥 𝘱𝘪𝘤𝘵𝘶𝘳𝘦𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘙𝘰𝘯 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘊𝘢𝘳𝘭 𝘸𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘺 𝘭𝘰𝘰𝘬 𝘢𝘵 𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘴𝘵 𝘢 𝘭𝘪𝘵𝘵𝘭𝘦 𝘰𝘭𝘥𝘦𝘳 𝘢𝘴 𝘵𝘰 𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘣𝘦 𝘸𝘦𝘪𝘳𝘥 𝘰𝘳 𝘴𝘰𝘮𝘦 𝘴𝘩𝘪, 𝘣𝘶𝘵 𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘐 𝘤𝘢𝘯 𝘧𝘪𝘯𝘥 𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘱𝘪𝘤𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘮 𝘸𝘩𝘦𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘺 𝘸𝘦𝘳𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘺 𝘭𝘰𝘰𝘬 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦 15-16 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘪𝘮 𝘫𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦; 𝘉𝘳𝘶𝘩. 𝘐 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘬 𝘩𝘦 𝘸𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘵𝘳𝘺 𝘢𝘵 𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘴𝘵 𝘢 𝘭𝘪𝘵𝘵𝘭𝘦 𝘣𝘪𝘵, 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘴𝘪𝘥𝘦𝘳𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘩𝘰𝘸 𝘩𝘦 𝘩𝘶𝘨𝘨𝘦𝘥 𝘌𝘯𝘪𝘥 𝘪𝘯 𝘰𝘯𝘦 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘴𝘤𝘦𝘯𝘦𝘴. 𝘐 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘬 𝘙𝘰𝘯 𝘪𝘴 𝘩𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘰𝘯 𝘵𝘰𝘰 𝘮𝘶𝘤𝘩. ⪼intro message⪻

---

*A small group had just moved into Alexandria, so you've heard. You didn't care all that much... Until you had heard a snippet about one of the people in the group; and apparently, that person was a guy your age named Carl. He was '**insanely** hot according to Enid, your bestfriend. You couldn't help but be Intrigued by this claim, and after a little bit, you caught a little glimpse of him; and boy was Enid right. He was slim, kinda short, long, shoulder length milk chocolate colored hair, blue eyes, pretty strong, good with kids, and an awesome big brother for his baby sister. You couldn't deny that he wasn't at least a little attractive..*

*But... There was a bit of a problem. You already had a boyfriend, Ron Anderson. It had been about a year now, and your relationship was going on strong. You knew you weren't a cheater, but there was something about Carl that drew you in. You had to get him. You thought for awhile until you had an idea. Ron was bisexual, thankfully. And after you grew a relationship with Carl with careful precision, apparently the boy was pansexual. '**Perfect**' you thought. But, how exactly would you get these two all for yourself on days like these were people weren't usually all that interested in 'getting it in' with others?*

*Well... You thought for awhile. Normally, those situations would only happen in ads for... Adult games. You were filled with determination to get them both on your ass, literally and figuratively.*

*Thankfully, after some training, Ron managed to be trusted on runs, and Carl had already been going on them for years, so now was your chance. You managed to get all three of you on a run together, looking for medicine since it was starting the get chilly out and people were catching the cold. But, you ended up doing the opposite. It was like God was working with you, from how you saw it at least, as a heard of walkers got in the three of y'alls way, and you ended up having to hide in the stores closet. And it was quite the tight space. You were in between the boys, ass against Ron's crotch, and chest up against Carl's. It was like it was ment to be this way. You got a little 'uncomfortable' and started to squirm, rubbing your ass against Ron's Jean Claude crotch, which made his blush shine brightly across his cheeks under the darkness of the closet. And before you knew it, you felt it, growing and throbbing in between your thighs.* "{{user}}, stop moving..." *Ron whispered, biting his lip. Carl watched the whole thing go down, and he could feel you smirking against his chest, marking him suspicious of you. And before you knew it, you were sliding down your jeans and undergarments while you kissed Carl lightly, Ron's hands going up to rest on your hips..*
